items.name_en: #🔥 Savoy Travel Bag#
items.name_cn:
#🔥 Savoy Travel Bag#
▫️Model 834469 Brown
▫️Dimensions 48*28*18
Gucci's latest Savoy series masterfully blends beige and dark brown tones with a classic silhouette, crafted from selected soft-touch fabric. This travel bag is made from coated GG interlocking fabric.

specs.rawTitle:
#🔥 Savoy Travel Bag#
▫️Model 834469 Brown
▫️Dimensions 48*28*18
Gucci's latest Savoy series masterfully blends beige and dark brown tones with a classic silhouette, crafted from selected soft-touch fabric. This travel bag is made from coated GG interlocking fabric.

items.name_en: #🔥Diana Canvas G Flower Bamboo Bag#
items.name_cn:
#🔥Diana Canvas G Flower Bamboo Bag#
▫️Model:655661
▫️Size:20*16*10cm
Exploded 💥 Recreating the classic bamboo 🪵 The tote shape everyone loves fused with retro classic bamboo elements❗️Made with original cowhide and G canvas, full leather lining 👍🏼Full copper hardware with two buckle straps that complement each other, highlighting a lively and elegant temperament. Fashionable and retro. The capacity is beyond imagination, it is simply too eye-catching on the street, unique, versatile, and premium!

items.name_en: #🔥Gucci Tote Bag #
items.name_cn:
#🔥Gucci Tote Bag #
▫️Model:659983
▫️Size:31*26*14cm
This bag is very grand[666]
Premium color scheme, simple and elegant design, very suitable for commuting or daily use. Equipped with an adjustable long shoulder strap, it is perfect for crossbody or single carry! Combines large capacity with practicality, suitable for everyone.

items.name_en: #BottegaVeneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style featuring an inner pouch
items.name_cn:
#BottegaVeneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style featuring an inner pouch
Very casual style 🔥
High-end feel, quiet and simple from the BV runway collection, the "Solstice"
Deep green, black, and ice cream colors present different aesthetics
Paired with jewelry-grade craftsmanship braids, the unique high-end feel is presented through the collision of soft leather and metal
Elegant, casual, and unique
Style No.: 740898
Size: 26*3*30cm
